We can probably move around a little bit. It’ll be interesting how that unfolds. Particularly in the second round, with the two picks there and one of them being more in the middle, there might be some more movement there.” The Packers own the 25th pick of the first round, the 41st and 58th pick of the second rounds, and the 88th and 91st picks of the third round. That gives Gutekunst plenty of options to move around the draft board to target a specific player or move if a position of need is getting short on talent.

description: Houston Texans 7-round mock draft: Texans use first three picks on defense | NFL Draft | PFF : The Houston Texans go for defense with their first three picks in this seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: Georgia safety Javon Bullard, Florida State interior defender Braden Fiske head to Houston: Bullard is a fiery competitor in the secondary who brings a desirable mentality, and Fiske is an effective one-gap penetrator from the interior. Offensive line kicks off the Texans' Day 3 picks: Pittsburgh tackle Matt Goncalves and Wisconsin center Tanor Bortolini provide depth for Houston's front five.

description: Full Texans 2024 NFL mock draft with 2 weeks to go : The Houston Texans not only fortify their defense but also bring in offensive depth C.J. Stroud and the defending AFC South champions.
intro: We’re just over two weeks away from the 2024 NFL draft taking the spotlight in Detriot for three days. And while the Houston Texans don’t have a first-round pick, that doesn’t mean they can’t land a Day 1 starter or two in the second round. Houston’s built to win now. Headlined by a breakout season from Offensive Rookie of the Year C.J. Stroud, the Texans are looking to build off their AFC South champion run and end their drought of making it to the conference title game. Stroud, who became the fifth passer in league history to throw for over 4,000 yards as a rookie, will be faced with added pressure as a rising star under center. On paper, Stroud has an exceptional supporting cast. Nico Collins is coming off a breakout season where he finished top-10 in receiving yards. Rookie Tank Dell should be cleared for all offseason workouts after suffering a fractured fibula in December. Meanwhile, Nick Caserio invested in his star passer on a rookie deal by adding a bit more fuel to the offense with the acquisitions of Pro Bowlers Joe Mixon and Stefon Diggs.

description: Houston Texans 7 Round Mock Draft; Defense Takes Over Early : NFL Draft week is here and along with it comes a new seven-round mock draft from Texans Wire's Logan Farrow
intro: The NFL draft week is here, and the Houston Texans are in a far different situation than they were a year ago. The Texans might not have a first-round pick after trading back with the Minnesota Vikings, but they’re loaded with options on Day 3. General manager Nick Caserio has made it clear, however, he’s willing to move up for the right player. Last season, the Texans made a franchise record eight on draft weekend. The year before Caserio broke the record with seven trades, including one backward and two forward.

description: 2024 NFL Mock Draft : The Indianapolis Colts lock up one of the best non-quarterbacks in the 2024 NFL Draft in this latest mock draft.
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft is finally here tonight, and the mystery surrounding who the Indianapolis Colts will select in the first round will finally be solved. What is arguably the most realistic best-case scenario for the team if they stay at the 15th overall pick? Let's take a look.

description: Jay’s Colts Mock Draft 1.0 : Jay Robins mock drafts what the Colts could do in the 2024 NFL Draft. Could a surprise or two await Colts fans?
intro: April has begun, which means the NFL Draft is under a month away! The Colts (as of now) have 7 picks, 1 for each round, for the 2024 NFL Draft. As of now they own just all of their own picks for the first time in years heading into the draft. But knowing Ballard, expect the Colts to move around the board a bit to acquire value. There is always the chance for a trade up, which has netted in past Drafts:

description: 2024 NFL Mock Draft : With the 2024 NFL Draft this week, this is what an Indianapolis Colts draft haul could look like.
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft takes place this week, and the Indianapolis Colts are finalizing their draft board in anticipation of the three-day event. The Colts still have a few holes on their roster that need addressing. After re-signing all their top free agents, the Colts seem to be running it back in 2024 with mostly the same roster as 2023. However, adding explosive pass catchers and help in the secondary remain the top priorities for Indy heading into the draft. Regardless of who the Colts take in the draft this week, those players are bound to be high-level athletes with tremendous upside. With Draft Week now upon us, here is our third and final Colts' mock draft ahead of one of the most important weekends of the year.

description: Colts 2024 NFL mock draft battle: Vote for your favorite : In this mock draft battle, four 7-round computer simulations were ran for the Colts. Take a look at how each turned out and vote for your favorite.
intro: Welcome to the 2024 Colts’ Mock Draft Battle, where you will decide which seven-round mock draft turned out best for Indianapolis. Using the Pro Football Focus mock draft simulator, I ran four seven-round mock drafts with the computer making all of the selections. The reason that I let the computer make all of the picks was to take as much of the human element out of the equation as possible but also to add some variety to each mock draft–and the computer did not disappoint. Below you will find all seven selections for the Colts in each mock draft, along with a breakdown of how I believe the draft turned out. At the end, you will have the opportunity to vote for which mock draft was your favorite.

description: Indianapolis Colts get more dynamic in latest 2024 NFL mock draft : The Indianapolis Colts are a roster with a bright future. The 2024 NFL Draft has a chance to push the team over the top.
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft is just days away at this point, which means we are finally going to get clarity of what the draft landscape really looks like. A team like the Indianapolis Colts enters next Thursday in a very unique position. They already have their potential franchise quarterback with Anthony Richardson, a good offensive line and some foundational pieces throughout the roster. This draft is about maximizing their roster upside and filling in any gaps.  The Colts head into the three day event with seven total draft selections. They are dead in the middle of the first round, and are one of the more interesting teams to pick for.

description: Jacksonville Jaguars 7-round mock draft: WR Keon Coleman, CB Nate Wiggins headline the class | NFL Draft | PFF : The Jacksonville Jaguars solidify their wide receiver room in this seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: Keon Coleman is a big-bodied threat for the Jaguars: The 6-foot-4 and 215-pound athlete enjoys getting physical with cornerbacks, as he constantly catches passes through contact. A new secondary weapon in Jacksonville: Nate Wiggins' 6-foot-2 frame and length allow him to disrupt receivers in the contact window and at the catch point, and he also has above-average athleticism for the position.

description: Jaguars draft two pairs of teammates in latest 2024 NFL mock draft : In this most recent 2024 NFL mock draft, the Jacksonville Jaguars end up selecting two pairs of college teammates.
intro: The Jacksonville Jaguars have watched as teams around the AFC South have gotten a whole lot better over the course of this offseason. The Colts have done a nice job retaining their best players, while the Texans and Titans have added some big names via trades and free agency. Meanwhile, the Jaguars haven't necessarily had a poor offseason. They've just been underwhelming by comparison. So, how do they hit a home run in the upcoming 2024 NFL Draft and ensure they stay competitive this year? In our latest mock draft, the Jaguars start by finding a couple of immediate-impact players on both sides of the ball.

description: Who will the Jaguars take in the NFL Draft? Final seven-round mock draft for Jacksonville : The Jaguars have eight picks in the 2024 NFL Draft and a laundry list of draft needs. Here's our latest Jaguars mock draft on who they could pick.
intro: The Jacksonville Jaguars will head into today's draft with one thing in mind — competition. Jaguars general manager Trent Baalke and head coach Doug Pederson have often stressed the need to field a more competitive unit, starting with adding to various position groups in free agency and continuing that through the 2024 NFL Draft. Set to kickoff at 8 p.m., the Jaguars currently hold the 17th-overall pick and are unlikely to make any moves surrounding that pick until the draft begins.

description: Jaguars endure the worst-case scenario in this 2024 NFL Mock Draft : Here's how a bad 2024 NFL Mock Draft for the Jacksonville Jaguars could potentially look.
intro: The Jacksonville Jaguars took care of several key needs in free agency. Next, they'll need to keep loading up on talent in the 2024 NFL Draft. Working in their favor is that there are multiple directions the front office can take to fill the remaining holes. That said, there are no guarantees in the draft. The Jags, in particular, have had a somewhat encouraging track record in the first round the past three years. However, their success rate decreases considerably in the later rounds. This begs the question, will Jacksonville be able to come out with a handful of playmakers, or will they squander most of their picks? This NFL Mock Draft explores the latter scenario.

description: 2024 NFL draft: Jaguars seven-round mock : Jaguars Wire projects Jacksonville's 2024 NFL draft with a seven-round mock.
intro: The next step on Jacksonville’s path toward a potential return to the playoffs is the 2024 NFL draft, as the Jaguars enter the annual selection ceremony with eight picks, including five in the top 116. Although the club was one of the most active in NFL free agency spending this year — dishing out over $188 million in guaranteed money — Jacksonville has work left to do as it attempts to strengthen its roster following a disappointing, 9-8 finish in 2023, missing the postseason after its run to the AFC Divisional Round the year prior. The Jaguars are well-positioned to take advantage of what the 2024 NFL draft class has to offer in terms of talent. Jaguars Wire projects Jacksonville’s approach to the draft with the following seven-round mock.

description: Full 7-round Chiefs mock draft: Should Kansas City take Xavier Worthy with the No. 32 pick? : Should the Chiefs draft Xavier Worthy with their first-round pick? Check out this mock to see if it makes sense to take him at pick No. 32.
intro: The Kansas City Chiefs need a wide receiver to add to their offense in 2024, and many experts believe the defending Super Bowl champions should look to select one of the many elite wideouts in the coming draft class with their No. 32 overall pick in the first round. While it is impossible to tell what general manager Brett Veach has planned for Kansas City’s earliest selection, one thing is certain: Whomever the Chiefs pick will be expected to produce in their rookie season. Veach has a plethora of options, and Kansas City is in a particularly enviable position. As back-to-back Super Bowl winners, the Chiefs are a top landing spot for any prospect in the 2024 class, especially any wide receiver who would stand to benefit from playing with Patrick Mahomes. Check out this full seven-round mock draft that has the Chiefs taking an elite speed threat in the first round before addressing other areas of concern on days two and three:

description: Kansas City Chiefs 7-round mock draft: Ladd McConkey provides more help for Patrick Mahomes | NFL Draft | PFF : The Kansas City Chiefs get more receiving help for Patrick Mahomes in this seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: More receiving help for Patrick Mahomes: Ladd McConkey is a highly nuanced receiver who has the athletic ability and football intelligence to be a difference-maker in the slot at the NFL level.

description: 2024 NFL Mock Draft : In the second Arrowhead Report 2024 NFL Mock draft of the week, the KC Chiefs get talented WR Adonai Mitchell in round one and add considerable depth later on.
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft is quickly approaching, and the Kansas City Chiefs have plenty of important decisions to make as the week unfolds. For general manager Brett Veach and his staff, the draft is a chance to add at lacking positions such as wide receiver and left tackle. Additionally, it'll provide opportunities to insulate the roster with depth and cost-controlled talent. Each pick Kansas City makes is geared towards not only a potential three-peat championship push, but also the future. Joshua Brisco of Arrowhead Report joined me for a mock draft to realistically project how Thursday, Friday and Saturday could unfold. The NFL Mock Draft Database was used for our simulation and Drafttek's Rich Hill Model trade chart helped with trade values. Let's jump in.

description: FINAL Kansas City Chiefs Mock Draft of 2024 : The final Kansas City Chiefs seven-round mock draft of 2024 sees the team target a surprising position in the first round.
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft is just days away, which means there is time for just one more Chiefs mock draft. After winning their second Super Bowl in as many seasons, Kansas City is looking to become the first team in league history to hoist three consecutive Lombardi trophies. If they want to accomplish that goal, they’ll need to make the most of their seven picks.

description: Chiefs 7-round mock draft: Trading up for a dynamic wide receiver in Round 1 : In our final mock, we pull off a trade for the Chiefs to give Patrick Mahomes a quality target. Later, we address needs in the trenches.
intro: We’ve reached NFL Draft week, so now is the time to reveal our final mock draft for the Kansas City Chiefs. General manager Brett Veach and coach Andy Reid already have one of the league’s best rosters. The question, though, is the same as last year: How do Veach and Reid improve the Chiefs through the draft? The positions of need are similar to last year, too: receiver, defensive end and left tackle. When the first round begins Thursday night, the Chiefs have seven picks, including two in the fifth round.

description: Rhett Lewis' 2024 7-round Raiders mock draft : NFL Network host and Raiders.com contributor Rhett Lewis takes a shot at projecting all seven rounds for the Raiders ahead of the 2024 Draft.
intro: NFL Network host and Raiders.com contributor Rhett Lewis takes a crack at projecting all seven rounds for the Raiders ahead of the 2024 Draft.

description: Raiders 3-round Mock Draft: Trading down on Day 1 and checking off all boxes : In our latest Raiders 3-round Mock, Las Vegas trades down on Day 1 and still checks all boxes.
intro: With the 2024 NFL Draft only eight days away, the Las Vegas Raiders are preparing for what could be one of their biggest drafts in a long time. This offseason, the Raiders brought in veteran general manager Tom Telesco to take the helm of the franchise, and the hope is he can stack talent via the draft the way he did in Los Angeles, especially on Day 1. For the Raiders, there has been significant early struggles in the draft, as the first round has not been kind to them outside of Kolton Miller and Josh Jacobs since 2018. Telesco has to prove he can end that streak, because on Day 2 and 3, Las Vegas has found some gems that have become cornerstone players. The good news is, the Raiders roster is in better shape going into the NFL Draft than it has been in some time, and it will be interesting to see what they decide to do early on. They hold solid draft capital, possessing two of the first 44 picks, and based on recent mocks, it is anybody's guess as to what they plan to do with the selections.

description: Raiders Draft 2024: 7 round mock draft : With quarterbacks going early, Las Vegas goes BPA and reinforces trenches
intro: It’s finally here. The NFL Draft week has descended up on us with the three-day event kicking off on Thursday with Round 1. With a new general manager and (not so new, but permanent) head coach in tow, the Las Vegas Raiders have ample opportunity to build a roster in Tom Telesco’s and Antonio Pierce’s vision. The Silver & Black GM and head coach, respectively, embark on their combined journey with the No. 13 overall pick. Unless the Raiders maneuver up or down, that’s where the team is slated to pick in the opening round Thursday. Telesco said the team has plans in place to trade up, pick, or trade down so without further ado, let’s get to this mock draft:

description: Las Vegas Raiders 3-Round Mock Draft: Exploring Potential Picks For The Silver and Black - Bleacher Nation : Las Vegas Raiders 3-Round Mock Draft - It's a new era in Las Vegas, and while they still have questions surrounding the most important position on the team,
intro: Las Vegas Raiders 3-Round Mock Draft – It’s a new era in Las Vegas, and while they still have questions surrounding the most important position on the team, there’s a lot of discussion about what the Raiders will do with their first-round selection. Do they have the ammo to move up to land one of the top quarterbacks? Are they high enough on Michael Penix Jr. or Bo Nix to select them at pick 13? It’s a roster with a lot of needs, and it’ll be interesting to see what they do when they’re on the clock.

description: Raiders NFL mock draft 3.0: Filling the biggest need at No. 13 — and it's not a QB : The cost to trade up for a quarterback is prohibitive — if not impossible — but Oregon State's Taliese Fuaga would be a great addition.
intro: On the 10th anniversary of the absurd “Draft Day” movie, observers are really looking to the Las Vegas Raiders to offer a team three first-round draft picks so they can move up in the draft. And unlike big-screen general manager Kevin Costner, the Raiders would actually know who they were trading up for — Heisman Trophy winner Jayden Daniels. The problem, besides the price tag of such a trade, is the Washington Commanders very well might take Daniels at No. 2. Quarterbacks could go with the first four picks of the draft — with wild card J.J. McCarthy joining Caleb Williams, Daniels and Drake Maye — and that would leave the Raiders stuck at No. 13. “Stuck” taking the best player available. “Stuck” filling the biggest hole on offense with a right tackle who plays with the edge that coach Antonio Pierce covets.

description: Dueling mock drafts: Trade up or trade back? : Comparing two 2024 NFL Draft scenarios for the Las Vegas Raiders, trading up and trading back, and letting Raider Nation decide what’s best.
intro: Heading into the 2024 NFL Draft, cases could be made for scenarios where the Las Vegas Raiders trade up or down during the first round. The Raiders need a quarterback but they’ll likely strike out on one of the top four, and maybe even top five, QBs with the 13th overall pick unless they get aggressive and move up. However, if Las Vegas can’t get a deal done or gets outbid, then going in the opposite direction and acquiring more draft capital wouldn’t be a bad idea. So, using Pro Football Focus’ mock draft simulator, let’s take a look at how Las Vegas’ draft hauls would differ in those scenarios. Both drafts below will include a brief explanation and assessment of how well the team’s needs have been filled. Also, you can vote for your preference between the two in the poll at the bottom.

description: Raiders 7-round NFL Mock Draft: Shocking Day 1 trade throws first round into frenzy : On the night before the 2024 NFL Draft, our latest 7-round mock has the Las Vegas Raiders making a big trade-up to get their franchise quarterback
intro: More than four months of anticipation are ending as we are finally in 2024 NFL Draft week and all those Las Vegas Raiders mock drafts and film reviews will turn into actual selections. For us here at Just Blog Baby we will be shifting from mock drafts to draft grades for the Las Vegas Raiders but we still have time to squeeze in one last mock to get you ready for draft weekend. In our last several mock drafts we have either accepted being stuck at 13 and drafting Michael Penix or trading down to late-first or early-second and drafting another QB but we take a different approach this time around. We make a massive splash at the top of the first round to go up and get the QB most of Raider Nation has been calling for since he showed up in the Allegiant Stadium locker room for a post-game celebration. After that initial splash, we go back to the positions of need but also look to focus on how we can make life easier for that young QB. Whether that is drafting great offensive lineman, getting him a big body tight end that can block and make contested catches, or building up the defense to give him short fields, we do it all.

description: Raiders mock draft 4.0: Impact defensive player and later answer to the QB question : Quinyon Mitchell or Terrion Arnold at No. 13? This is the Raiders. Go for the speed of Mitchell.
intro: It’s the 10-year anniversary. The Las Vegas Raiders’ poor track record of making good picks early in the draft has become an annual talking point. The last draft class where they truly cashed in on their early-round selections came in 2014 when they took edge rusher Khalil Mack, quarterback Derek Carr and guard Gabe Jackson with their first three picks. A decade later, the pressure is on for general manager Tom Telesco to end the proverbial drought. The hiring of head coach Antonio Pierce sent a wave of optimism through team headquarters and the fan base alike, but the on-the-field results will only continue to fall short unless the Raiders start to have much better success in the draft.

description: Las Vegas Raiders confirm one of two rumors in this 7-Round 2024 NFL mock draft : There are multiple rumors going around regarding the Las Vegas Raiders' 2024 NFL Draft plans, and one of them gets confirmed in our latest mock.
intro: Leading up to the 2024 NFL Draft, one of the biggest storylines for the Las Vegas Raiders has been in regards to the quarterback position. The team has Aidan O'Connell and recently signed Gardner Minshew, but neither one of them are long-term options, and we know it. So, do the Raiders actually plan on pursuing a top-tier quarterback in a couple of weeks? One of the rumors going around says the Raiders plan on moving up to draft their franchise quarterback. With that in mind, Las Vegas makes a bold move in our latest mock draft.

description: Raiders 5-round NFL mock draft without a quarterback | Sporting News : Many Las Vegas Raiders fans want the team to take a quarterback in the 2024 NFL Draft, but what if that doesn't happen? We explore that scenario in our latest mock draft.
intro: The Las Vegas Raiders enter the 2024 NFL Draft with needs to address on both sides of the ball, including offensive line, cornerback, and quarterback. While many are pleading for general manager Tom Telesco to take a quarterback early, Las Vegas could instead focus on bolstering the roster around Gardner Minshew or Aidan O'Connell, especially if the team doesn't find itself in position to grab one. That said, here is a five-round Raiders mock draft that covers that scenario.

description: Las Vegas Raiders 7-round mock draft: Las Vegas improves secondary and grab future QB in first two rounds | NFL Draft | PFF : Trevor Sikkema reveals his seven-round Las Vegas Raiders mock draft.
intro: Terrion Arnold brings big-time talent to Las Vegas Raiders secondary: Arnold played mostly outside cornerback for Alabama over the past two seasons but gained some experience in the slot in 2023. He has great long speed, recovery speed, acceleration and agility. He also brings impressive ball skills with good on-ball production.

description: Raiders draft 2024: Mock with trades : The Las Vegas Raiders makes some trades in this 2024 NFL mock draft including one former Washington quarterback Michael Penix
intro: We are offering our second full seven-round Las Vegas Raiders mock draft. This one has no trades. I will offer one other full Raiders’ mock this week, that features a huge trade up. We have already done a full mock with no trades this week. Full disclosure: Some players may appear on multiple mocks as we exercise our way up to draft day Thursday:

description: Las Vegas Raiders: Final dual 2024 NFL mock drafts : Here is a look at our final Las Vegas Raiders mock draft for the 2024 NFL Draft.
intro: After months of mock projections and prospect breakdowns, we will find out how teams will approach the 2024 NFL draft. Some have linked the Las Vegas Raiders to two quarterbacks in particular. Will they make a move for one of them? The Raiders have the No. 13 pick, which will make it difficult for them to pull off a blockbuster trade, though every draft has its surprises.  The Raiders have glaring needs along the offensive line and at cornerback, though they should add a rookie quarterback to compete with Gardner Minshew and Aidan O’Connell. The team needs more speed and explosiveness at running back and wide receiver as well. In the lead-up to the draft, we’ll roll out dual mock projections for all seven rounds, highlighting what general manager Tom Telesco might do and what seems like the best option for each pick.

description: Final Rams Mock Draft: Defense dominates in this outstanding Rams draft haul : In a Final Rams Mock Draft: Defense dominates in this outstanding Rams draft haul
intro: The LA Rams are about to do something that they haven't done since 2016. But with so much build-up and anticipation, will the experience of making a selection on Day 1 of the 2024 NFL Draft live up to the expectation? After all, it's just one draft pick with a myriad of players and positions to spend it on that there is bound to be a feeling of let-down among some fans, no matter who the Rams choose. This is it, the week you have all been waiting for. The LA Rams, and all 32 NFL teams for that matter, are about to change their trajectory for the 2024 NFL season. Choose wisely, and any NFL team could become a shocking Cinderella story as an unexpected participant in the 2025 NFL Playoffs. Choose unwisely, and the team could be set be several years in their hopes of competing in the postseason.

description: 7-round mock draft: Rams pass on edge rusher, take WR in Round 1 : What would a draft haul look like for the Rams if they pass on an edge rusher in Round 1 and take a WR instead?
intro: Most analysts and fans expect the Los Angeles Rams to take either an edge rusher or defensive tackle in the first round of the draft next week. That’s probably a good bet, but Les Snead and Sean McVay rarely do the expected. That’s why in our latest seven-round mock draft, we have the Rams going in a different direction by addressing a position that’s not necessarily a pressing need with their first pick. Rather than taking an edge rusher such as Laiatu Latu or Chop Robinson at No. 19, we went with LSU wide receiver Brian Thomas Jr. – a dynamic playmaker who would be the perfect complement to Puka Nacua and Cooper Kupp. Here’s our full seven-round projection for the Rams with the draft just over a week away.

description: Rams 3-round mock draft: L.A. goes all defense with first 4 picks : Laiatu Latu and Kamari Lassiter headline fake Rams draft
intro: Even with less two weeks left until it starts, there are still billions of mock drafts left to go. This particular one by a YouTuber went all defense with the L.A. Rams’ first four picks in rounds one, two, and three.

description: 2024 NFL Draft: Los Angeles Rams New 7-Round Mock Draft Targets Key Needs - LAFB Network : The Los Angeles Rams will enter the 2024 NFL Draft having dealt with several key needs, particularly in the secondary and the offensive line, but this also
intro: The Los Angeles Rams will enter the 2024 NFL Draft having dealt with several key needs, particularly in the secondary and the offensive line, but this also means they still have glaring needs in the wake of Aaron Donald’s retirement. They don’t have to just replace a great defensive lineman, but they have to replace a player that the defense was built around, a tide that lifted all boats.

description: Los Angeles Rams 7-round mock draft: Bo Nix headlines the Rams' class | NFL Draft | PFF : Bo Nix headlines the Los Angeles Rams' class in this seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: A new QB in town: Some see Bo Nix's age as a negative, but it has made him one of the more knowledgeable QB prospects with a better pre-snap understanding of defenses than most. Amarius Mims has elite potential at tackle: It's hard to believe how the 6-foot-7, 340-pound Mims can sit down in his stance and run to cover ground.

description: Los Angeles Chargers Mock Draft 2024: 7-Round Mock Using ESPN, PFF Simulators - LAFB Network : Who will the Chargers draft in 2024? Ahead of the 2024 NFL Draft, dive into our final Los Angeles Chargers mock draft.
intro: Who will the Los Angeles Chargers draft at 5? The 2024 NFL Draft is days away which means we are close to being introduced to the Chargers draft class in 2024. Before Los Angeles makes its picks, we’re conducting one final Chargers mock draft of the year. In the past, our Chargers 7-round mock draft has been conducted using PFF’s simulator. This time around, we’re introducing ESPN’s draft simulator and offering two different draft strategies for the Chargers.

description: Los Angeles Chargers 7-round mock draft: Chargers hit the jackpot, select Marvin Harrison Jr. at No. 5 | NFL Draft | PFF : Trevor Sikkema reveals his seven-round Los Angeles Chargers mock draft.
intro: As we charge towards the 2024 NFL Draft (get it?), our seven-round team mock draft series continues with the Los Angeles Chargers. With a lot of picks and a new identity to establish now that Jim Harbaugh is in charge, here is what draft weekend could look like for Los Angeles.

description: Los Angeles Chargers three-round 2024 NFL mock draft Thursday 3.0 : The Chargers go all offense with their first three selections.
intro: The 2024 NFL draft is two weeks away, so the in-depth coverage of who the Chargers could target while they’re on the clock is nearing an end. With that being said, this will be the third installment of three-round mock draft Thursday, where I lay out different scenarios every week on how the first three rounds could play out for Los Angeles.

description: 2024 NFL draft: Alex Katson's final 7-round projections for Chargers : With the draft set to kick off Thursday evening, Alex Katson delivers his final predictions for the Los Angeles Chargers' full draft class.
intro: Draft night grows ever closer, with a Chargers-related twist just in time to throw a wrench into everything right as the city of Detroit welcomes fans and media from around the league. Here are my final projections for what Los Angeles will do over the course of the next three days.

description: Chargers 7-round mock draft: Predicting what Jim Harbaugh, Joe Hortiz will do : The most likely scenario for the Chargers seems to be trading down from the No. 5 pick and targeting an offensive lineman.
intro: Draft week is finally here. It is time to put some predictions on the record. Welcome to Mock 4.0. As always, this final seven-round mock draft of the offseason is my best guess at what the Los Angeles Chargers will do later this week. Not what they should do. What I think they will do. Important distinction. Coach Jim Harbaugh and general manager Joe Hortiz are entering their first draft together. As such, there is quite of a bit of unknown surrounding the Chargers’ approach. That made this exercise more difficult than past years, when we had quite a bit of data to work with from former GM Tom Telesco.

description: FINAL Los Angeles Chargers Seven-Round Mock Draft : The final Chargers seven-round mock draft of 2024 has the team address the offensive side of the ball early and often.
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft is just days away, which means there is time for just one more Los Angeles Chargers mock draft. With Brandon Staley and Tom Telesco now elsewhere, Jim Harbaugh and Joe Hortiz have their first real opportunity to reshape the roster. Armed with nine picks, the Chargers must make the most of their selections to make it back to the playoffs in 2024.

description: Miami Dolphins 7-round mock draft: Miami reloads at interior defender with Kris Jenkins | NFL Draft | PFF : The Miami Dolphins prioritize the trenches in this seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: Kris Jenkins replaces Christian Wilkins: The Michigan product's run-stop percentage ranks in the 99th percentile due to how well he can hold up against double teams and control one-on-one run-blocking situations.

description: Miami Dolphins 3-Round Mock Draft: Exploring Potential Strong Picks to Bolster the Defense - Bleacher Nation : The Miami Dolphins have a first-round pick for the first time in three seasons and should have plenty of interesting options with the 21st overall selection.
intro: The Miami Dolphins have gotten close to reclaiming a spot atop the AFC East but fell a tad short again in 2023. They punched a postseason ticket for a second straight year under Head Coach Mike McDaniel but eventually lost to the Kansas City Chiefs 26–7 in one of the coldest games in NFL history. This Dolphins team is certainly heading in the right direction, but just need a few key players to get there, and they can add that in this year’s NFL Draft. The Dolphins have a first-round pick for the first time in three seasons and should have plenty of interesting options with the 21st overall selection. They have just six picks overall in this year’s draft and this mock draft covers two of those selections as we head into Thursday night’s event.

description: Dolphins 7-Round Mock Draft: The trenches become a focal point : In our latest 7-Round NFL mock draft, the Miami Dolphins make the trenches a priority.
intro: How do the Miami Dolphins keep up with the vaunted AFC that continues to get better, it seems? The 2024 NFL Draft is a start, and Miami has some notable voids to fill. Miami has limited draft capital this year, so they'll have to be selective and ensure they attack the correct areas. In our latest mock, there's definitely a theme.

description: Who will the Dolphins take in the 2024 NFL Draft? Latest seven-round mock draft for Miami : The Miami Dolphins have six picks in the 2024 NFL Draft and multiple needs. Here's our latest Dolphins mock draft for all seven rounds.
intro: The Miami Dolphins reached the playoffs for the second consecutive year in 2023 and likely would have been content to run it back with only minor changes to the roster. But then the salary cap and free agency got in the way, creating for a busy time for general manager Chris Grier. And putting a bigger onus on making Miami's draft picks count. Offensively, the Dolphins have needs on the interior offensive line and receiver, pending a decision by Odell Beckham Jr. to possibly become Miami's No. 3 behind Tyreek Hill and Jaylen Waddle. Defensively, Miami needs help on the defensive line (edge and tackle) and safety (Jordan Poyer will soon turn 33).

description: Vikings 7-round mock draft: Finding the quarterback of the future, one way or another : In our final mock draft, we predict the Vikings will make a huge trade to move up to No. 3 and nab QB Drake Maye of North Carolina.
intro: They have evaluated the quarterbacks. They have drawn up their NFL Draft board. And now, the Minnesota Vikings must wait and see. See who the Washington Commanders select at No. 2. See what the New England Patriots do at No. 3. And see how multiple other quarterback suitors jockey for position at the top. It’s crunchtime for general manager Kwesi Adofo-Mensah, who will likely be defined by what happens Thursday night, one way or another. This is our final Vikings mock draft, a projection of how we expect things to fall. It includes a quarterback, three trades and 10 selections in full.

description: 2024 7-Round NFL Mock Draft: Vikings target QB in trade up to 3rd overall | Sporting News : The Minnesota Vikings trade up to third overall for a quarterback in this seven-round mock draft.
intro: The Minnesota Vikings are going to be a team that is fascinating to watch during the NFL Draft. They are the likely team to trade up for a quarterback and they have all the ammunition to do so. Now, that doesn't mean they will be able to make it happen. There are a lot of different factors to consider with the main one being a team in the top five won't be willing to make the trade with the Vikings. If and when that happens, that could end up being a disaster. There are a lot of different options that the Vikings could end up exploring in the NFL Draft. One of those is a drastic trade up for a quarterback. That was the entire discussion on Purple Daily Tuesday morning as Tyler Forness joined the show to break it down. Here are all the picks they made for the Vikings.

description: Adam New’s Vikings Mock Draft 2.0 | 2024 : The final Vikings mock draft for 2024 from Vikings Territory writer Adam New.
intro: Like last time, these are not predictions, but what I would do if I were calling the shots in Minnesota. The 2024 draft will be one of the most important in Minnesota for years and promises to define the current regime’s success (or not). We start the same way we did last time. Trade:  Minnesota sends the 11th overall pick, a 1st in 2025, and a 3rd in 2026 to the Los Angeles Chargers in exchange for the 5th overall pick. A few things have to happen for this scenario to play out. Washington, New England, and Arizona all stick and pick, leaving Minnesota’s draft QB4 on the board. Can the Vikings get away with not using pick 23 in a trade-up? That will depend on the level of desire for trading up for teams like the New York Giants and Denver Broncos. If the Vikings can pull it off and draft a quarterback and keep the 23rd pick, they can add a player for the defense. Kwesi Adofo-Mensah will be cooking.

description: Dustin Baker's Vikings Mock Draft 2.0 | 2024 : There will be one more before the event on April 25th — a predictive final mock draft — but this is 2.0 from Dustin Baker.
intro: The Minnesota Vikings own nine picks heading into the 2024 NFL Draft. General manager Kwesi Adofo-Mensah has much more capital this year than last. Minnesota needs a quarterback after Kirk Cousins departed one month ago, and most expect Adofo-Mensah to trade up in the draft for a Top 4 prospect. So, here’s the best stab at a predictive mock draft for the 2024 Vikings. One trade was made with the Los Angeles Chargers.

description: 2024 NFL Mock Draft : What would the Vikings need to trade to land an elite QB prospect in the 2024 NFL Draft? We look at one scenario with a seven-round mock draft.
intro: While their division-rival Bears are in control of the 2024 NFL Draft board, much is out of the Minnesota Vikings' control this year. It's a frustrating place to be if you're a Vikings fan. The departure of Kirk Cousins in free agency has left them with no choice but to find a quarterback in this year's draft, and their proverbial backs are against the wall.  The good news? It's a great quarterback class. The bad news? Minnesota's first pick isn't until No. 11. General manager Kwesi Adofo-Mensah has done his best to arm Minnesota with everything they'd need to get their guy, though. He already pulled off a trade with the Houston Texans to acquire No. 23 overall to make the Vikings one of three teams with multiple first-round picks and the only team in the group (besides Chicago, picking first) that needs a quarterback.

description: 7-round mock draft: Putting the pieces together ahead of pivotal Patriots draft : Matt St. Jean’s final mock of the offseason puts together what we know about the Patriots from the pre-draft process.
intro: With a week and a half left before the 2024 NFL Draft, here is my final mock draft. I went with no trades in this one and had a focus on players the New England Patriots have been connected to in the draft process.

description: New England Patriots 7-round mock draft: Patriots reset with Jayden Daniels and two WRs | NFL Draft | PFF : The New England Patriots reset with a quarterback and two wide receivers in this seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: The New England Patriots’ identity rebuild started when Tom Brady left in free agency, and it has now fully plunged into a new world with Bill Belichick no longer the head coach. As Jerod Mayo begins to build this team and this roster his way, here’s what his first draft could look like.

description: Perry's 7-round Pats mock draft: Projecting an offensive facelift : The picks are in! Phil Perry shares his final prediction for all eight New England selections in his seven-round, Patriots-specific 2024 NFL Mock Draft.
intro: You've seen our first-round mock draft -- which includes New England grabbing UNC quarterback Drake Maye at No. 3 overall -- but what kind of people would we be if we left you on the edge of your seat wondering what happens with the remaining Patriots picks on draft weekend? The wait is over, friends. Here's one way in which Days 2 and 3 could play out for Jerod Mayo, Eliot Wolf and the rest of the brain trust over at One Patriot Place.

description: Patriots 7-round mock draft: Drake Maye and then help at WR and OT : Our final seven-round mock draft for the Patriots lands QB Drake Maye, an outside wide receiver and an offensive tackle in Rounds 1-3.
intro: At long last, NFL Draft week is finally here. The New England Patriots are just a few days away from making their most important, most highly anticipated draft pick in decades — likely choosing a quarterback with the No. 3 pick. By now, you’ve read scouting reports, various opinions and “The Beast” from our Dane Brugler, and you probably have an opinion on whether you prefer Jayden Daniels or Drake Maye. But with only a few days remaining, let’s fire up the mock draft machine one final time for our last seven-round mock for the Pats. We’ll also include a breakdown from Dane with each pick.

description: 7-round mock draft: Two first-round picks help transform the Patriots offense : The Patriots are active on the trade market in our final seven-round mock draft of the year.
intro: It’s finally draft week, and it’s time for our final seven-round mock draft of the offseason. In a few days, we will finally be able to talk about what the New England Patriots did in the draft, instead of what we think they should be doing. For the moment, however, let’s still focus on that and dive right in.

description: Patriots' worst-case scenario 2024 NFL mock draft : Not all drafts go according to plan, no matter how dire it needs to be. That could be what happens with the Patriots in 2024, detailed by this worst-case scenario mock draft.
intro: Fortunately, the 2024 NFL Draft is just a couple of weeks away, so we won't have to guess who the Patriots will select this year for much longer. It's a critical draft that will surely dictate the future of the organization, all under the new leadership of Jerod Mayo, presumed general manager Eliot Wolf, and the rest of the new staff. The plan, as always, is to put together an impressive class that can immediately improve the team and become the centerpieces of the future. But what if that's not what happens this year? What if the new staff completely botched the process and went against everything believed to be the best way to navigate the draft?

description: Full 7-round NFL mock draft: Patriots pull off back-to-back shocking trades : The New England Patriots pull off shocking first and second-round trades in the latest seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: The 2024 NFL draft is a week away, which means the mock drafts are coming to an end. For New England Patriots fans, it’s starting to get exciting because they don’t have too wait much longer to find out the direction the team will be headed in for the foreseeable future. Now that we are getting closer to projections being as close as possible, and my own big board rankings complete, this will be a mock draft tailored to if I was in the driver’s seat. It’s too much randomness to try and predict what the front office will do, as this will be the first for this new regime post-Bill Belichick. Let’s get right into this full seven-round Patriots mock draft with trades as we get closer to draft night. Here’s how the board fell this time around:

description: Final 7-round 2024 NFL mock draft: Patriots get massive offensive upgrades : The New England Patriots make big moves on offense in the final seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: The New England Patriots have a chance to course correct coming off the worst season in the Bill Belichick era. They sputtered their way through free agency, but the splash fans have patiently waited to see could come at the 2024 NFL draft. It’s the beginning of the Jerod Mayo and Eliot Wolf era, and New England has eight picks in total, including the No. 3 overall pick. It’s a rare position to be in for a team looking for a new franchise face to take over the reins at quarterback. But it isn’t just about the quarterback position. The Patriots need game-changing playmakers at receiver and reliable offensive lineman to ensure whoever is under center has a fighting chance.

description: Patriots 2024 NFL mock draft: Trading back to take two wide receivers : The Patriots trade back to acquire an extra Day 2 pick in our latest mock draft, which has them landing a quarterback at No. 3 overall.
intro: In less than two weeks, speculation over which quarterback will be available to the Patriots at No. 3 overall in the 2024 NFL Draft will finally be over. Here’s a latest look at how we could see the Patriots’ draft shaking out from April 25-27.

description: Yaccarino’s 2024 Saints Mock Draft 3.0 : The last one for the 2024 NFL Draft!
intro: The NFL Draft is right around the corner, and the New Orleans Saints roster is set, barring any twists. Let’s see how the Saints can fill the remaining holes on the roster with their copious picks in this year’s draft.

description: NFL Mock Draft Simulator: Final Saints 7-Round Selections : Happy Draft Day! Here's one final Saints mock draft before we get into the fun stuff.
intro: Draft day is upon us, and we're more than ready to see how things unfold in the first round on Thursday night. The New Orleans Saints obviously have a good bit of needs and musts to address coming into the draft, and they'll get their first crack at it when they pick at No. 14. Of course, that's assuming that they don't trade up, which is absolutely a possibility given their track record. With the draft nearing, mock draft season is coming to its end. Here's one last one for you regarding the Saints, which is technically my fifth but the first I've put out here officially and have written about. Let's dive in.

description: New Orleans Saints 7-round mock draft: Jordan Travis, Keon Coleman reunite | NFL Draft | PFF : The New Orleans Saints add a quarterback and a top wide receiverhome in this seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: A new QB in New Orleans: The Saints select Florida State's Jordan Travis in the fifth round of this 2024 NFL mock draft. Jordan Travis reunites with Keon Coleman: Coleman enjoys getting physical with cornerbacks, as he constantly catches passes through contact.

description: Final 7-round mock draft for the Saints in 2024, with trades : It's finally draft day. Here is our final seven-round mock draft for the New Orleans Saints in 2024, with trade predictions.
intro: It’s finally draft day. The New Orleans Saints will add a new member to the black and gold during Thursday night’s first round of picks, but it’s important to remember that the 2024 draft lasts longer than just that one frame. There are seven rounds of picks to work with, and the Saints will have many opportunities to get better. They can’t afford to let these chances slip through their fingers. So here is our final seven-round mock draft, exploring what we expect the Saints to do. Here’s how they can field a better team in 2024 than fans saw in 2023:

description: Hayden’s 2024 Mock Draft 2.0 : Saints get plenty of weapons this time around
intro: Bowers was one of the most dominant forces in college football the last three seasons. Bowers is a three-time All-American and the only two-time winner of the John Mackey Award for college football’s best TE. He would be an instant starter and an instant contributor and the best TE the New Orleans Saints have had since Jimmy Graham. Despite need on the offensive line, if you have a chance to get a player with upside as great as Bowers at pick 14 at another position of need you would be a fool to pass up on it.

description: Hubbard’s Mock Draft 3.0 : Saints address their biggest need in round one.
intro: The NFL Draft is just over a week away now, and a lot of prospect visits are wrapping up, so we have a bit of an idea about what positions each team is eyeing as we get closer to draft day. The New Orleans Saints main visitors have been offensive and defensive linemen along with some pass catchers, so that should tell us where their mind’s at going into this thing, but truly, you never know what’s going to happen. Despite that, I’m going to take a stab at trying to figure out what the Saints will do in this year’s NFL Draft.

description: 2024 NFL Mock Draft: What if the Saints trade down in the first round? : The New Orleans Saints could do the impossible for them and trade down in the first round of the draft. Here is how it could look if the Saints did that.
intro: The New Orleans Saints haven’t traded down in a draft since 2007. However, this year feels like one in which it could make sense for the Saints to do so. They have many needs that need to be filled if they want to stay competitive next year. Trading back and stocking up on more picks could help make that happen. In this draft, I traded picks 14 and 174 to the Cincinnati Bengals for picks 18, 80, and 115. This allows New Orleans to have two extra picks in the top 120. This would allow them to fill more holes on the roster with quality players. Here is one way that the Saints could take this draft if they do that trade.

description: FINAL New Orleans Saints Seven-Round Mock Draft of 2024 : The final New Orleans Saints seven-round mock draft has the team aggressively fixing the offensive side of the ball early.
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft is almost here, which means there is time for one last Saints mock draft before the big event. New Orleans once again mortgaged the future in the offseason, meaning they’re not willing to embrace the tank but also don’t have the money to fix their flaws in free agency. This style of team building means that the Saints need to hit just about every last one of their picks if they want to make it to the playoffs for the first time in the post-Drew Brees Era.

description: Jeff Duncan: The Saints wheel and deal in my one and only 2024 mock draft : In some ways, the 2024 NFL Draft is well suited for the New Orleans Saints.
intro: In some ways, the 2024 NFL Draft is well suited for the New Orleans Saints. It’s deep in talent at positions where they need help: offensive tackle, wide receiver, cornerback. Unfortunately, it’s not a deep draft overall, and that works against the Saints, who are one of nine teams with just two picks in the top 100 selections. Seven of their nine picks are in the last three rounds. In a draft that most analysts say only goes 120 prospects deep, that could be a problem. Consequently, I expect the Saints to be aggressively wheeling and dealing in Rounds 2-7. I’ll be shocked if they maintain the status quo and end up making their nine selections as is.

description: Besson’s Mock Draft 4.0: Keeping Michael Pratt in New Orleans : Besson’s selections from the Top Notch Sports mock draft event
intro: Over the weekend, I teamed up with Top Notch Sports to do a 32-person 7-round mock draft for this upcoming 2024 draft. Over the two-day event, content creators for all 32 NFL teams selected players over seven rounds for their team's needs and wants. Here is who I drafted based on how the board fell.

description: New York Giants 7-round mock draft: Malik Nabers, Braden Fiske headline a group of impact players | NFL Draft | PFF : The New York Giants add two offensive playmakers and solidify their defense in this seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: As the 2024 NFL Draft nears, our seven-round team mock draft series continues with the New York Giants.

description: 2024 NFL Draft: Giants 7-round mock addresses big needs | Sporting News : Here is a full, seven-round NFL mock draft for the New York Giants, which addresses their biggest needs.
intro: The New York Giants are just over one week away until they are on the clock with the No. 6 overall pick in the 2024 NFL Draft. While there are several ways the Giants can go with the No. 6 overall pick, they have five other selections that will truly shape their draft. Using the Pro Football Focus mock draft simulator, we conducted a full seven-round mock draft for the Giants.

description: New York Giants 7-Round Mock Draft : The NFL Draft is right around the corner, and we're putting together a New York Giants 7-Round Mock Draft today.
intro: The Chicago Bears could really use one of the big three receivers to pair with Caleb Williams, so we’re swapping the sixth and ninth picks in the 2024 NFL Draft in exchange for a 2025 second and fourth-rounder from the Bears. J.J. McCarthy is a promising quarterback known for his diverse passing abilities and athleticism. He excels at making quick decisions under pressure and is particularly effective against blitzes. However, his development has been somewhat limited by Michigan’s offensive system. While he needs to work on his processing speed and deep passing outside the numbers, his potential as a high-ceiling prospect is evident. With his skill set and familiarity with pro-style concepts, he’s likely to be a first-round draft pick.

description: Giants 7-round mock draft: Can NY trade up for a QB, or will it have to 'settle' for WR? : The Giants have done their homework on this year's QBs. But will they take one in the first round of the NFL Draft?
intro: Giants general manager Joe Schoen has maintained that he wants to build the team through the NFL Draft. There may not be a bigger piece added to the foundation than this year’s top selection, as the Giants are in prime position to add a quarterback or an elite wide receiver with the No. 6 pick. So what will Schoen do at No. 6, and how will he supplement the roster with his five other picks? Here’s a shot at projecting what could happen in my first — and only — seven-round Giants-only mock draft of the offseason. Giants NFL Draft poll: What do you think they should do at No. 6? These picks were made based on what I think Schoen will do — I’ll publish my ideal draft plan next week. And these picks were made based on who was available in a Pro Football Network mock draft simulation:

description: Giants seven-round NFL mock draft 4.0: Big Blue takes Malik Nabers, sticks with Daniel Jones : In the Post's fourth Giants-only mock draft, the Giants give Daniel Jones a WR1.
intro: Soon enough, the time for mocking will be over and done with and the real thing will be upon us. The lead-up to an NFL draft is always packed with wild and crazy scenarios and head-scratching conversation and intrigue. That is what makes it so much confounding fun. In the first three Giants-only mock drafts, we mostly stayed true to the specific simulators and tried to sprinkle in a bit of everything to appease the quarterback crowd and the wide receiver crowd. We did not do much for the offensive line crowd because that is not a direction the Giants are believed to be headed up high in this draft. For this final stab at it, we ran simulations from Pro Football Focus, Pro Football Network and Sportskeeda and, when we deemed it appropriate, freelanced a bit based on an instinctual knowledge of how the Giants think about things.

description: 2024 Mock Draft: Can the Giants get a quarterback and a receiver? : Can Trader Joe get a steal on draft night?
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft is almost here, and with it the newest crop of New York Giants. Ed has been doing a great job of presenting scenarios each week leading up to the draft as a way of examining the myriad ways in which the draft could play out. One scenario that’s intrigued me is the idea of coming away from the draft with a quarterback as well as a top wide receiver. However, I think there’s a very real possibility that neither Bo Nix nor Michael Penix Jr. makes it past the Las Vegas Raiders at 13th overall. So if the Giants want to come away with a quarterback, they’re going to have to make that pick in the top half of the first round. I could be very wrong about this, but I don’t think it’s terribly realistic to trade back into the first round for a quarterback.

description: Who will the Giants take in the 2024 NFL Draft? Here's our final seven-round mock draft : What will Joe Schoen do at No. 6 overall in the 2024 NFL Draft, and how will that shape the rest to follow? Plus: a mock trade for a QB!
intro: We've made it. The NFL Draft is just hours away, and soon after the festivities kick off in Detroit, the waiting game will be over. For months, there has been speculation about what Joe Schoen and the New York Giants will do. Trade up. Trade down. Stay put. Quarterback. Wide receiver. Pull off a surprise. It's all on the table. The Giants continue to keep people guessing, and sometimes that is very hard to do. For years, the Giants were very easy to read in the NFL Draft. Secrets got out and plans were wrecked because of that. That's not the case with Schoen in charge.

description: Giants mock draft: ESPN simulator throws a QB curveball : A quarterback falls into Giants’ lap at No. 6
intro: ESPN has — finally — come out with its 2024 draft simulator. So, to perhaps change things up a bit in our weekly New York Giants mock drafts let’s use it.

description: 7-round mock draft: Giants find their franchise quarterback : Nick Falato takes a swing at a Giants-only mock draft
intro: It’s that time of year! In next week’s 2024 NFL Draft the New York Giants will add several college athletes to their roster in an effort to strengthen their team for 2024 and beyond. The Giants are making a big splash in my lone mock draft - a trade-up with the New England Patriots to select North Carolina quarterback Drake Maye.

description: New York Jets 7-round mock draft: Troy Fautanu heads to New York in Round 1 | NFL Draft | PFF : The New York Jets target offensive weapons and offensive linemen in this seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: As the 2024 NFL Draft nears, our seven-round team mock draft series continues with the New York Jets.

description: Who will the Jets take in the 2024 NFL Draft? Our final seven-round mock draft : The New York Jets have eight picks in the 2024 NFL draft and a laundry list of draft needs. Here's our latest Jets mock draft on who they could pick.
intro: After an over two month wait since the Chiefs repeated as Super Bowl champions on Feb. 11, the 2024 NFL Draft is finally here! Only one day remains until the lives of prospects and organizations will be changed forever based on the decisions they make during the seven-round, three-day event in Detroit. Jets general manager Joe Douglas and his staff has been active early and often throughout the offseason, bringing veterans such as wide receiver Mike Williams, offensive tackles Tyron Smith and Morgan Moses and acquiring linebacker Haason Reddick from the Eagles in exchange for Bryce Huff.

description: Jets 7-round mock draft: Rome Odunze, Brandon Coleman fill offensive holes : The Jets' biggest needs are wide receiver and offensive tackle. In Zack Rosenblatt's mock, they move quickly to address both positions.

intro: The 2024 NFL draft is quickly approaching, and it's an important one for the New York Jets as they try to capitalize on having Aaron Rodgers. description: Jets seven-round NFL mock draft 4.0: Gang Green takes Brock Bowers to pair with Aaron Rodgers : Here is The Post's final Jets NFL mock draft ahead of the 2024 NFL Draft on Thursday, where the Jets have the No. 10 pick in the first round.
intro: The end of mock draft season has arrived. It is time for the real thing. The Jets moved around a little in the draft this week when they traded Zach Wilson to the Broncos. They acquired a sixth-round pick (No. 203) and sent a seventh-round pick (No. 256) with Wilson to Denver. It is not a seismic change but jumping up more than 50 spots could help the Jets land a player who can contribute down the line. We’ve been over every scenario with the Jets, but their first pick (No. 10) will come down to whether the team thinks it is more important to take a lineman who could possibly help in 2024 but more likely helps in the future or a pass catcher who could contribute immediately.

description: Philadelphia Eagles 7-round mock draft: Eagles add Kool-Aid McKinstry and Payton Wilson to an already strong defense | NFL Draft | PFF : The Philadelphia Eagles add first-round-caliber players with their first three picks in this 2024 NFL mock draft.

description: 2024 NFL mock draft: Eagles reload on defense after pulling off six trades in 7-rounds : We're looking at an Eagles-related mock draft in which Philadelphia comes away with 13 picks after making six trades in seven rounds
intro: It’s NFL draft time, and no GM in the NFL makes better use of the board than Philadelphia Eagles top executive Howie Roseman. Philadelphia’s GM has conducted over 41 draft-day trades over the past ten years, not including the 2015 draft when coach Chip Kelly snatched personnel control.

description: 2024 Philadelphia Eagles Mock Draft: Eagles Fix Up the O-Line, Stockpile Weapons to Avoid Another Collapse - Bleacher Nation : A three-round Eagles mock draft comes to a screeching halt after the second round, as Philly does not own a third rounder this year. The do have two in the
intro: A three-round Eagles mock draft comes to a screeching halt after the second round, as Philly does not own a third rounder this year. The do have two in the second though and three picks in the first 53 isn’t a bad way to shore up some needs. The Philadelphia Eagles enter the 2024 NFL Draft with a two-pronged mission: solidify their offensive line and bolster their offensive firepower. Jalen Hurts has shown promise, but inconsistent protection and a lack of explosive options are hindering the Eagles’ offensive potential. This Eagles mock draft explores how the Eagles might address these needs in the first three rounds.

description: Eagles 7-round mock draft: Round 2 trade-up for a speedy receiver : After weeks of speculation and analysis, it’s time to make a final projection of how this year’s NFL Draft will play out for Philadelphia.
intro: Draft week is finally here. After weeks of speculation and analysis, it’s time to make a final projection of how this year’s NFL Draft will play out for the Philadelphia Eagles. They’re a team entering a new era of player leadership. Jason Kelce and Fletcher Cox have retired. A young core whose early success yielded a Super Bowl LVII appearance has been infused with a talent-laden free-agency pool and, together, they already form a top-five roster, according to a projection model by The Athletic’s Austin Mock.

description: Final Eagles-only 2024 seven-round mock draft : Will the Eagles stick to the trenches and go with Georgia OT Amarius Mims in the first round?
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft is now just a day away, so let's go ahead and put out our final Philadelphia Eagles-only mock draft of the season. As a reminder, after various trades, the Eagles currently have eight draft picks this year, with two in the second round.

description:
Final NFL Mock Draft Simulation: Eagles take OL in the first round : The NFL draft is in less than a week! There are still so many ways the three days could play out for the Eagles, but here is a path that feels like it might happen. 
Using the Pro Football Focus...
intro: The NFL draft is in less than a week! There are still so many ways the three days could play out for the Eagles, but here is a path that feels like it might happen.

description: 2024 NFL Mock Draft: Eagles add pass defense early : The Eagles look to improve pass defense in NFL Draft
intro: The Philadelphia Eagles started the 2023 season as hot as can be, going 10-1 and looking like the Super Bowl favorite. Unfortunately that all crashed around them, as they went 1-5 to end the season. They were then beaten fairly easily in the Wild Card round by the Buccaneers 32-9. They’ll look to shore up their pass defense in the draft, which was their biggest weakness in their end of the season collapse. But will also be in play for offensive line early on.

description: Eagles go cornerback first in fan-sourced Eagles-only mock draft : In our final fan-sourced Eagles-only mock draft of 2024, the Eagles take a cornerback at No. 22.
intro: With just a few days before the start of the 2024 NFL Draft, we decided to sneak in one more fan-sourced mock draft. With the help of the PFF mock draft simulator, we went through all eight of the Eagles picks and I asked Eagles fans on Twitter/X to make the picks out of four options provided by me. Here are the results:

description: Buy low, sell high: Steelers work draft-day huge trade sending Justin Fields to Broncos in new mock : The Steelers could get a huge return for Justin Fields ahead of the draft.
intro: The Pittsburgh Steelers got a huge bargain when they traded a conditional sixth-round pick in the 2024 NFL draft to the Chicago Bears in exchange for quarterback Justin Fields. But in this mock draft scenario, the Steelers see that Fields has a big payday coming they don’t feel ready to commit to so they strike while the iron is hot and trade Fields to the Denver Broncos for their third-round pick (No. 76) and fifth-round pick (No. 136). After the trade, the Steelers now have an extra high pick but it throws quarterback into the mix as a draft need.

description: Carney: Steelers’ 2024 Mock Draft (Final Version) : Steelers Depot's Josh Carney puts together his final seven-round mock draft for the Pittsburgh Steelers, addressing some key positions.
intro: Just like that, the pre-draft process is all but over. In just a few days, the 2024 NFL Draft will come and go, and it will be clear who the Pittsburgh Steelers pursued and ultimately selected in the 2024 NFL Draft. To date, the Steelers held a number of formal Combine interviews, attended numerous Pro Days and hosted more than 30 players for official pre-draft visits, building quite an extensive list of prospects. Knowing that, it’s time for my final seven-round mock for the Pittsburgh Steelers. This feels like a “pencils down!” moment after months of watching film, analyzing prospects, attempting to read the tea leaves and more. My final mock took a bit longer than expected. I just kept trying to shift things around and get the best haul possible that made me feel the most comfortable, considering need, player interest and realistic draft windows for said players.

description: Farabaugh: Pittsburgh Steelers 7-Round Mock Draft : It's Draft Day, and I'm ready to release my one and only 7-round Pittsburgh Steelers mock draft before they pick tonight. Who will it be?
intro: I don’t write many mock drafts. I only write every year because I often find it banal to painstaking crease through prospects without the full table of information needed to make picks. Last year, I got three picks right: Broderick Jones, Keeanu Benton, and Nick Herbig. I’m not sure I will be able to pull that off again this year, especially because this is the murkiest a Steelers draft has felt in a long time. But here it goes—my one and only 7-round Steelers mock draft.

description: Steelers 7-round mock draft: First-round trade-up to help solidify offensive line : With team needs in mind and players who might still be around when Pittsburgh is on the clock, here's one final seven-round projection.
intro: Who are the Pittsburgh Steelers going to take in the first round? That’s the question people have as we head into draft week. While the final answer could range anywhere from Oregon center Jackson Powers-Johnson to Iowa cornerback Cooper DeJean to Georgia tackle Amarius Mims, the reality is the only one who knows right now is the draft board itself. The Steelers spent the past couple of months scouting hundreds of players at the Senior Bowl, the NFL combine and pro days, and then inviting them to the UPMC Rooney Sports Complex for one of 30 official visits to be able to whittle down a draft class to a handful of prospects who would fit into their organization when they’re on the clock at No. 20.

description: Steelers Mock Draft: Final predictions for Pittsburgh's 2024 draft haul : I followed the clues and tried to fill the needs, and I present you with my final, realistic mock draft for the Steelers ahead of the event starting.
intro: The NFL draft is almost here, and I want to give my final prediction as to what the Steelers will do when they are on the clock. This will be a cut-and-dry mock with no trades, although I fully anticipate this team to move around as they did a season ago. To note, this is not what I personally want this team to do in the draft. I’d like to see some improvement over how I did last year, as the only pick I got right was Broderick Jones (although I did have Keeanu Benton and Joey Porter in my “Others Considered” sections). With a lot of needs and not a surplus of draft picks, here is my final try at predicting what the Steelers do during the draft.

description: Steelers Draft 2024: Bailey final mock draft : Jarrett Bailey’s final Steelers mock draft of the 2024 draft season
intro: Good lord I cannot wait to not hear the phrase “Mock draft” for the next year. At this point in the offseason when it’s been nothing but mock draft this, mock draft that on social media for three months, it’s enough to make me want to put my head in the oven. Anyway, this is my final Steelers mock draft of the 2024 draft season- let’s get into it.

description: Final Steelers 2024 NFL Mock Draft before Round 1 : The Pittsburgh Steelers are almost on the clock but, before they are, here is a final prediction of their picks in the 2024 NFL Draft.
intro: The 2024 NFL draft is just hours away and mock season is almost over. It's time for one final try to predict the Steelers' draft haul for 2024. For this mock draft, I tried to think of all the names that Pittsburgh has been associated with throughout the process as well as names the Steelers themselves have shown a clear interest in. With those players in mind, I selected those that I believe best fit the team's needs and who Pittsburgh's front office may take if the board fell the way the simulation did. Here's one final crack at the Steelers 2024 draft!

description: Pittsburgh Steelers 7-round mock draft: Two WRs head to Pittsburgh | NFL Draft | PFF : The Pittsburgh Steelers select two wide receivers in this seven-round 2024 NFL mock draft.
intro: Ricky Pearsall, Brenden Rice join the Steelers: Pearsall is a projected slot receiver, and Rice is a smooth runner who can gain separation at all three levels of the field. CB Nate Wiggins is Pittsburgh's pick in Round 1: Wiggins' 6-foot-2 frame and length allow him to disrupt receivers in the contact window and at the catch point. He also has above-average athleticism for the position.

description: Joe Kuzma's 2024 3-Round "Something Different" Steelers Mock Draft - Steel City Underground
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft is less than a week away, and mock drafts are everywhere to be found. Heck, I even did one the other day, projecting four rounds of Steelers picks. What will Team A do at Pick B, you ask? That’s the million-dollar question everyone is trying to seek answers for. Even in my previous draft, I was meticulous in my crafting of how the Steelers might approach business. It’s no secret that the team is currently missing a starter center and could use help at the wide receiver spot. Some other fans are begging for a right tackle, with the theory being that last year’s first-round pick, Broderick Jones, moves over to left tackle replacing Dan Moore Jr. But what if the Steelers go a different direction? That’s what I’ve been mulling as I look at their defensive back depth chart and the future beyond Cameron Heyward with the defensive linemen. Does Omar Khan, Mike Tomlin, and company have their sights set elsewhere?

description: Final Pittsburgh Steelers Seven Round Mock Draft : The Pittsburgh Steelers fill all their key holes and land much-needed offensive line help in this final mock draft.
intro: The 2024 NFL Draft is soon here, which means it is soon time to put the mock draft simulators away until next year. The excitement of mock drafts will be replaced by the letdown of our favorite team not drafting the prospect we just know will be a great player. For the Pittsburgh Steelers, their draft needs to be a good one. Their quarterback play should be better in 2024, which means they have a chance to find themselves back in the playoffs if they can fill some key needs in the draft. This seven round Steelers mock draft gives a blueprint of what their draft could look like.

description: Steelers most realistic mock draft: A sneak peak at a likely 2024 draft class : The Steelers were able to produce a realistic mock draft in this recent installment. With the draft kicking off next Thursday, their draft class could be this.
intro: Pittsburgh has shown a couple of different cards from their deck heading toward the NFL Draft. We know they have shown a lot of interest in the trenches on both sides of the ball. They have also shown a good chunk of pre-draft interest in receivers and cornerbacks. It seems like they will try and attack those positions as early and often as possible. Based on what we know through pre-draft meetings, visits, and pro-day interest, the Steelers will have these prospects on watch. If these players fall to them in any manner, then they will select them in the upcoming draft more likely than not. They were able to attack plenty of needs in this mock draft and make the fans happy for the most part.

description: Heitritter: Pittsburgh Steelers’ 2024 Mock Draft (Final Version) : This is a seven-round mock draft predicting who the Pittsburgh Steelers will take in the 2024 NFL Draft by Jonathan Heitritter.
intro: Having conducted the Mock Draft Mondays for Steelers Depot the last few months, I have played through various versions of what the 2024 NFL Draft may look like for the Pittsburgh Steelers. Now that it is draft week, here is the final edition of my seven-round mock draft where I attempt to guess what I think the Pittsburgh Steelers WILL DO  come draft day based on Pro Day/pre-draft visits, interest shown at the Senior Bowl/Shrine Bowl and NFL Scouting Combine, as well as overall roster needs related to the talent at each position. So, sit back, strap in, and as the Yinzers say, “Here we go.”

description: Steelers Mock Draft: The Final Product : The Pittsburgh Steelers make two trades to add multiple starters in the 2024 NFL Draft.
intro: It's here. The 2024 NFL Draft is upon us and after months of watching everything the Pittsburgh Steelers do, and who they talk to, there's a sense of which direction this team is headed with their seven selections. The Steelers have kept their interest pretty clear throughout the process. Most of their pre-draft visits were offensive linemen, cornerbacks and wide receivers. The Pro Days they attended didn't jump out as anything surprising. And with some interest in defensive linemen, it appears they're ready to round out their roster in seven picks (or six). Mock Draft 3.0 has two moves the Steelers are predicted to make. With talent lining up in the first-half of the draft, Pittsburgh isn't going to wait around and miss out. Expect Omar Khan to be aggressive, and for the Steelers to add players who can make an immediate impact as they hunt for a Super Bowl.

description: McCorkle: Pittsburgh Steelers 2024 Mock Draft (Final Version) : Ross McCorkle's final predictive seven-round mock draft for the Pittsburgh Steelers ahead of the 2024 NFL Draft.
intro: With just four days until the 2024 NFL Draft, it is time for my second and final version of a Pittsburgh Steelers all-round mock draft. This is what I think the Steelers will do, and not necessarily what I would do. These picks will be the culmination of everything we have learned about the team’s interests over the pre-draft process, taking into account positions of need, pre-draft visitors, pro day tracking, combine meetings, all-star game interest, and more. Check out my last mock draft 1.0  from last month.

description: Kozora: Pittsburgh Steelers 2024 Mock Draft (Final Version) : Alex Kozora releases his final Pittsburgh Steelers mock draft, predicting what the team will do in the 2024 NFL Draft.
intro: We’ve made it. After a wild offseason, the 2024 NFL Draft is 60 hours away. This is my fourth and final Pittsburgh Steelers mock draft, predicting what I think the Steelers will do with their selections. We have all the information we’re going to get that clue us in on their selections. Free agency moves, NFL Scouting Combine invites, Pro Day tracking, a complete pre-draft list, and all the testing and data we’re going to get.

description: Steelers mock draft 2024: Nicastro’s final mock draft of the season : Who will be the next group to help shape the future of the black and gold?
intro: We’re just a few days away from the NFL Draft which can only mean one thing - no more takebacks. This is my final mock draft, and I hope you’ve enjoyed our coverage throughout. For this exercise, instead of picking who I think the Steelers would take out of a hat, I combed through every pick for each NFL team. Three full rounds, weighing team needs and evaluating top-30 visits. I wanted a clear picture of how the board could break, and I’ll take you through that thought process. The big caveat is that I did not include trades outside of round one. A trade-up or a trade-down for Pittsburgh would throw all mock drafts off - and I think it’s likelier to happen than not. It would have also given me a nasty headache.

description: Pavelle: My Steelers 2024 Predictive Mock Draft : Scott Pavelle's final version of his 2024 Pittsburgh Steelers Mock Draft, predicting what the team will do in this week's draft.
intro: Scott Pavelle’s final Pittsburgh Steelers mock draft, predicting what he thinks the team will do during this week’s 2024 NFL Draft.
